title: Aütyra: Winds & Wings
description: Taste the winds as you enter the free skies of the mythic realm of Aütyra. Build crafts, or earn your wings.
body:
> **_"I stand upon the precipice, before the flat edge. The Sun shines brightly - Venzu's blessed light unto this world, and the wind blows gently. In the serenity, my breath is my only companion, heard present. As I look unto the islanded realm in-view, between Aether and Mortal planes... I feel the last Forth. As I spread outwards my wings, earned... I leap... I am free."_**

!["Fly free, child of Ënhú..."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kP8e6BBq/images/921e729b1003f05c0a31088b5fe2d5908f2f6318.png)
Enter and explore the beautiful skyworld of Aütyra. Brave its past in the depths below and the ruins above or fly through and above the ranges higher up. Gain strength or embrace the freedom of the winds. Earn your wings, becoming one with the sacred Aerfolk. The enginuity of Man and the legacy of the sky princes/princesses live on within you. Shall you awaken before the voice of the wind?

Enabled by the [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands) mod thanks to Quidvio, journey the great floating islands and their ranges from mountains to savanahs and the clouds in between, high and low while dungeon conquering, exploring or coming in contact with wild dracos and more wildlife. Slew the tyrannical Ender Dragon to prove yourself worthy of your wings.

### Remember the Five Deities, whom always are in thy corner...

- **Ënhú**: _Chief of the divine and guardian diety of vast Aütyra and her circles and borders, father of the ancient Aerfolk of Aütyra as well as the Groundkeeps of the native villages._
- **Venzu**: _Shephard of the Sun and Moon, shining the realm with blessed lights._
- **Aeryi**: _Mistress of Aütyra's holy winds, which are held in reverence for its gentle coolness tempering Venzu's divine lamp while serving as the liberator and bridge of the Wing Barers._
- **Súrin**: _Lady of the wild, keeper and ambassador of flora and fauna._
- **Fynar**: _Maintainer of the cycle of life, death and rebirth. The Aerfolk believe stars to be ancestral and family souls watching from the Aether above, sometimes communing through their pale celestial lights. Stars which vanish from the midnight sky are believed to be souls who embraced reincarnation._
